grades.expectation: Response references CA Protocol section 4.0 or 4.1 specifically
grades.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'CA Protocol Section 4.0' in the opening and references it again at the end

grades.expectation: Response mentions the 4-year enforcement period for operational development
grades.reason: Response clearly states 'The 4-year enforcement rule doesn't apply here (work too recent)' and categorizes as 'less than 4 years ago'

grades.expectation: Response discusses whether indemnity insurance is appropriate vs obtaining retrospective consent
grades.reason: Response provides clear options: 'Regularisation certificate (retrospective planning permission), OR Bespoke indemnity insurance at seller's expense'

grades.expectation: Response mentions building regulations as a separate concern from planning
grades.reason: Response has a dedicated 'Building Regulations (Separate Check)' section addressing this as a distinct issue

grades.expectation: Response references specific enforcement timeline rules (4yr/10yr/12mo)
grades.reason: Response mentions 4-year rule for planning and 10-year rule for building regulations ('post-1984 work less than 10 years old')
